feat.name: Leshy Superstition
feat.text: You notice spirits that inhabit objects, learning which bring good fortune and which are unlucky. You focus on the power of a lucky object, granting you a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throw against the triggering effect.

traits.name: Leshy
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the leshy ancestry. These small plant or fungus creatures are humanoid in form. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by leshies. A weapon with this trait is created and used by leshies.

feat.trigger: You attempt a saving throw against a spell or magical effect, but haven’t rolled yet
